title: ImUi Edit Lifecycle Diag Gate v1
problem: `imui-response-status-lifecycle-v1` landed the first private `ResponseExt` lifecycle vocabulary, but the edit lifecycle proof still needed a promoted diagnostics gate and the editor-proof scripts had drifted from the shipped demo semantics. This follow-on owns the narrow repro/gate/evidence closure without widening public IMUI, `fret-ui-kit::imui`, or runtime APIs.

repro.summary: Run the promoted response-signals lifecycle suite, then run the editor-proof outcome suite that exercises the existing drag/text/numeric proof surface.
commands: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-response-signals-edit-lifecycle --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_response_signals_demo
cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-editor-proof-edit-outcomes --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo

gates.name: diag-registry-rust
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag registry check

gates.name: response-lifecycle-suite
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-response-signals-edit-lifecycle --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_response_signals_demo

gates.name: editor-proof-suite
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag suite imui-editor-proof-edit-outcomes --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin imui_editor_proof_demo

continue_policy.notes: This lane is closed after adding the narrow edit lifecycle diag gates and fixing the proof surfaces they rely on. Start a narrower follow-on for additional lifecycle coverage, public `fret-imui` widening, or runtime contract changes.
